title: Flowers & Campfires
description: A Visually Appealing & Well Optimized Modpack focused around Building.
body:
# Flowers & Campfires
Hi Wildee here, Flowers & Campfires is a visually appealing & well optimized modpack that I have created that is mainly for personal use but I decided to release it out to the public, what makes this modpack different from any others you may ask,
## Performance
This Modpack has amazing Performance and is quite Lightweight through the use of;
- C2ME & Noisium
- Modernfix & FerriteCore
- Sodium & Sodium Extra
- Lithium
###  And More!

## Visuals
This Modpack uses Many Visual Mods & Resourcepacks to overhaul the general feel and look of minecraft!
- Hold my Items & Detailed Animations & Not Enough Animations
  * This allows for smooth Player Animations in First Person & Third Person
- Camera Overhaul & Better Third Person Camera
  * This overhauls the general feel of the game through camera shaking, tilting and a much more appealing Third Person Camera
- Fog & Particle Rain & Angel's Weather
  * This overhauls the general look of the weather and fog system through more concealing Fog and much more appealing Rain Particles
 ### AND SO MUCH MORE!!!

 ## VOICECHAT & SOUNDS!!!!
### The Modpack Includes Sound Physics Remastered, Sounds, Simple Voicechat & Audio Player 
Which allows for humorous screams of help down in the mines, OR like what I do and blast music so loud the nearby neighbours can hear it muffled through their walls in game!
And also amazing sounds for everything!!

## Last Bit of Information
I've tried to stay close to the original vision of minecraft but overhaul the general feel and look of the game, I haven't mentioned a lot of the mods like Perception which adds in trails for projectiles as this list would be forever, however I do sincerely hope you enjoy this modpack as much as I do :)

> ![A white animal with 4 legs and a stick figure looking head with 2 extremely cute eyes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/459e9c05df80daa81bab699d19c88b89b96b64c2_0.webp)

### Regarding Issues with the Modpack
I currently don't have a discord server or github set up to take in issues, I don't think I have the will power and time to maintain a modpack, so very sorry :(
